---
title: "Michal Ovádek"
---

::: {.callout-note}
This Quarto site is being built. The live landing page is currently still
served from the static `index.html` at the repo root. When the consolidated
site is ready to cut over, this file will be renamed to `index.qmd` and the
static HTML will be deleted in a single commit. Until then, this page exists
only at `/home.html` in the rendered Quarto output.

See `AGENTS.md` for the migration plan.
:::
